Approx. type odds0.23%among eligible artifact types

How To Use It

Cooldown reduction is the readable effect family. The value range applies the same display multipliers used by the game artifact tooltip, so it is easier to compare with in-game rolls.

Recycles Into

MaterialQty
Radiated Junk40-50
Hydrogen Spill40-50
Toxic Waste40-50

Related Artifact Variants

  • System Optimizer
  • Exceptional System Optimizer
